rationale: Row 10 LIST_ITEM verbatim character-for-character matches PDF p.101 (CM Example 1 narrative). Sibling_index=3 consistent with prior Rows 1-6=1, Rows 7-9=2, Row 10=3 narrative-row pattern. parent_section §6.1.2 CM correct (Example 1 sits inside CM-Examples, which is the Examples sub-block of §6.1.2). pdf_evidence: p.101 'Row 10: Records for subject ABC-0003 are collapsed into a single entry that spans the relevant time period, with a frequency of "PRN". This is shown as an example only, not as a recommendation. This approach assumes that knowing exactly when aspirin was used is not important for evaluating safety and efficacy in this study.'

rationale: PDF p.102 Example 3 cm.xpt Row 1 has 10 columns: Row=1, STUDYID=ABC123, DOMAIN=CM, USUBJID=1, CMSEQ=1, CMTRT=ZOLOFT, CMPRESP=Y, CMOCCUR=Y, CMSTAT=(empty), CMREASND=(empty). Atom verbatim shows 9 pipe-separated tokens '1 | ABC123 | CM | 1 | 1 | ZOLOFT | Y | Y | |' which renders as 8 values + 1 empty cell — missing one trailing empty cell representation. PDF has 2 trailing empty cells, atom has 1. R8 empty-cell rule violated for second trailing empty (CMREASND).
pdf_evidence: p.102 Example 3 cm.xpt header: 'Row | STUDYID | DOMAIN | USUBJID | CMSEQ | CMTRT | CMPRESP | CMOCCUR | CMSTAT | CMREASND' (10 cols). Row 1: '1 | ABC123 | CM | 1 | 1 | ZOLOFT | Y | Y | (empty) | (empty)'. Should be '1 | ABC123 | CM | 1 | 1 | ZOLOFT | Y | Y | | |' with two trailing empty pipes (3 final pipes total).

rationale: 'cm.xpt' CODE_LITERAL appears on p.103 above the Example 5 cm.xpt table (continuation of CM-Examples block from p.101-103). parent_section=§6.1.2 CM correct per R9 (filename takes section where it physically appears, not abstract domain ownership). cm.xpt is on p.103 inside CM Example 5 narrative, which is still §6.1.2.
